title: Project Management
description: Plan work as file-first issues + milestones — board, gantt, roadmap.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Project Management
onboarding.intro: Track work as plain-file issues and milestones — every record is a workspace file you (or the agent) can read, edit, and version.

points.title: Create an issue
points.body: Use the quick-create form (or ask the agent) — each issue becomes `issues/N.md` with typed fields.

points.title: See it your way
points.body: The board groups issues by status, the gantt lays out their date spans, and the roadmap tracks milestones.

points.title: Roll up progress
points.body: Milestones back-reference their issues and roll up progress automatically — no manual bookkeeping.

suggestions.label: This week
suggestions.prompt: Which issues are due this week?

suggestions.label: Milestone status
suggestions.prompt: How is the current milestone tracking?
